UserPromptSubmit.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/hooks/codex/user-prompt-submit; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'

PreInvocation.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/codex/tools/drift-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'

PostInvocation.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/codex/tools/drift-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'

Stop.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/codex/tools/drift-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'
